subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath rent asunder the veils and turned towards the All-Glorious, the All-Bountiful, that he may hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من خرق الاحجاب و اقبل الی العزیز الوهاب لیسمع الندا من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
